vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe trong phân tích
vocab.example: Economics requires a level of analytical rigour that I find incredibly taxing to maintain for long periods.

vocab.meaning: vấn đề gây tranh cãi/khó khăn kéo dài
vocab.example: Mathematics has always been a bone of contention in my academic life, as I struggle to grasp its logic.

vocab.meaning: gây mệt mỏi cho trí não
vocab.example: Trying to translate ancient texts is extremely taxing on the brain due to the archaic grammar structures.

vocab.meaning: không thể tiếp thu/không bị ảnh hưởng bởi
vocab.example: For some reason, my mind seems completely impervious to scientific formulas, no matter how much I study.
The cryptic nature of philosophical paradoxes tends to elicit immense frustration whenever I try to decode them.

vocab.meaning: sự phức tạp như mê cung
vocab.example: The labyrinthine complexity of corporate law is what makes it the most grueling subject in my degree.
I often have to grapple with complicated statistical models that seem like a foreign language to me.

vocab.meaning: vượt quá khả năng hiểu biết
vocab.example: High-level astrophysics remains tantalizingly beyond my grasp, despite my interest in the stars.

vocab.meaning: một nhóm/loạt những thứ gây nản lòng
vocab.example: Chemistry involves a daunting array of symbols and equations that are easy to confuse.
Learning to write Chinese characters proficiently is an arduous task that requires years of rote memorization.
